item.title: Jack Carr’s Combat Stories Behind The Terminal List
item.description: Jack Carr reflects on the combat stories that shaped The Terminal List, offering a veteran’s perspective on service and experience.

media:content.media:title: Jack Carr’s Combat Stories Behind The Terminal List
media:content.media:description: Jack Carr reflects on the combat stories that shaped The Terminal List, offering a veteran’s perspective on service and experience.

item.title: I Carried the Grenade Launcher
item.description: A veteran reflects on carrying the grenade launcher, sharing a firsthand military memory with a focus on service and experience.

media:content.media:title: I Carried the Grenade Launcher
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on carrying the grenade launcher, sharing a firsthand military memory with a focus on service and experience.

item.title: WWII and Vietnam POWs Reflect on Captivity
item.description: WWII POW Lester Schrenk and Vietnam POW Eugene “Red” McDaniel discuss captivity, resilience, and the shared experience of American servicemen.

media:content.media:title: WWII and Vietnam POWs Reflect on Captivity
media:content.media:description: WWII POW Lester Schrenk and Vietnam POW Eugene “Red” McDaniel discuss captivity, resilience, and the shared experience of American servicemen.

item.title: A Veteran’s .45 for Iwo Jima
item.description: A veteran reflects on being given a .45 before Iwo Jima, offering a personal wartime memory from the Pacific campaign.

media:content.media:title: A Veteran’s .45 for Iwo Jima
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on being given a .45 before Iwo Jima, offering a personal wartime memory from the Pacific campaign.

item.title: The Promise I Made to My Combat Buddy
item.description: A veteran reflects on a promise made to a combat buddy, sharing a personal story of service, loyalty, and remembrance.

media:content.media:title: The Promise I Made to My Combat Buddy
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on a promise made to a combat buddy, sharing a personal story of service, loyalty, and remembrance.

item.title: Harvey C. Barnum Jr.'s Medal of Honor Story
item.description: Harvey C. Barnum Jr. recalls taking command under fire in Vietnam after his commander was killed. A Medal of Honor account of courage and leadership.

media:content.media:title: Harvey C. Barnum Jr.'s Medal of Honor Story
media:content.media:description: Harvey C. Barnum Jr. recalls taking command under fire in Vietnam after his commander was killed. A Medal of Honor account of courage and leadership.

item.title: From Vietnam to the Olympic Stage
item.description: A veteran’s journey from the battlefield of Vietnam to the Olympic stage, reflecting service, resilience, and achievement.

media:content.media:title: From Vietnam to the Olympic Stage
media:content.media:description: A veteran’s journey from the battlefield of Vietnam to the Olympic stage, reflecting service, resilience, and achievement.

item.title: FDNY Firefighter Niels Jorgensen on 9/11
item.description: Niels Jorgensen responded to Ground Zero after the South Tower was struck, spending days searching for survivors. A story of service and sacrifice.

media:content.media:title: FDNY Firefighter Niels Jorgensen on 9/11
media:content.media:description: Niels Jorgensen responded to Ground Zero after the South Tower was struck, spending days searching for survivors. A story of service and sacrifice.

item.title: A Tribute to Those Who Served and Sacrificed
item.description: A respectful tribute to veterans and all who served, honoring their sacrifice, service, and lasting place in history.

media:content.media:title: A Tribute to Those Who Served and Sacrificed
media:content.media:description: A respectful tribute to veterans and all who served, honoring their sacrifice, service, and lasting place in history.

item.title: WWII Veteran Manny Carvalho on Patton
item.description: Manny Carvalho reflects on the motivation to fight behind General George Patton, offering a WWII veteran’s firsthand perspective on service and leadership.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Manny Carvalho on Patton
media:content.media:description: Manny Carvalho reflects on the motivation to fight behind General George Patton, offering a WWII veteran’s firsthand perspective on service and leadership.

item.title: Ex-Marine Missions in Vietnam
item.description: A former Marine reflects on high-stakes missions in Vietnam, offering a firsthand account of service, leadership, and survival.

media:content.media:title: Ex-Marine Missions in Vietnam
media:content.media:description: A former Marine reflects on high-stakes missions in Vietnam, offering a firsthand account of service, leadership, and survival.

item.title: Robert Jeffrey’s Vietnam POW Story
item.description: Shot down on his first combat mission, Air Force pilot Robert “Bob” Jeffrey spent 2,611 days as a POW before returning home in Operation Homecoming.

media:content.media:title: Robert Jeffrey’s Vietnam POW Story
media:content.media:description: Shot down on his first combat mission, Air Force pilot Robert “Bob” Jeffrey spent 2,611 days as a POW before returning home in Operation Homecoming.
